'''daroro''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kadans|kadans]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-r-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kadans|kadans]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| daroro
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dærereth|dærereth]] || [[word:dærerej|dærerej]] || [[word:dæreresh|dæreresh]] || [[word:dærere|dærere]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:darororoth|darororoth]] || [[word:darororoj|darororoj]] || [[word:darororosh|darororosh]] || [[word:darororo|darororo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:daroroth|daroroth]] || [[word:daroroj|daroroj]] || [[word:darorosh|darorosh]] || [[word:daroro|daroro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:darofroth|darofroth]] || [[word:darofroj|darofroj]] || [[word:darofrosh|darofrosh]] || [[word:darofrof|darofrof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:darorotho|darorotho]] || [[word:darorojo|darorojo]] || [[word:darorosho|darorosho]] || [[word:daroroko|daroroko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:daroroth|daroroth]] || [[word:daroroj|daroroj]] || [[word:darorosh|darorosh]] || [[word:daroro|daroro]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:darorothol|darorothol]] || [[word:darorojol|darorojol]] || [[word:daroroshol|daroroshol]] || [[word:darorokol|darorokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:darorothotho|darorothotho]] || [[word:darorojojo|darorojojo]] || [[word:daroroshosho|daroroshosho]] || [[word:daroroko|daroroko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:darorothon|darorothon]] || [[word:darorojon|darorojon]] || [[word:daroroshon|daroroshon]] || [[word:darorokon|darorokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:darorothoro|darorothoro]] || [[word:darorojoro|darorojoro]] || [[word:daroroshoro|daroroshoro]] || [[word:darorokoro|darorokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
